---
title: How-to Guides
description: Task-focused recipes for common Calimero app jobs — pick the guide that matches what you need to do.
sidebar:
  order: 1
---

import { LinkCard, CardGrid } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

Short, task-focused recipes. Each guide solves **one** concrete job with a
minimal snippet taken from a real example app, and assumes you already have an
app skeleton building — if you don't, start with the
[Quickstart](/build/quickstart/).

| I want to… | Guide |
| --- | --- |
| Pick the right CRDT collection and read/write it | [Model your data](/build/guides/collections/) |
| Notify clients (or other methods) that something changed | [Emit and handle events](/build/guides/events/) |
| Invoke a method on another context | [Call another context](/build/guides/cross-context/) |
| Store a large binary and share it with peers | [Store and share a blob](/build/guides/blobs/) |
| Restrict who can write to a piece of state | [Access-controlled storage](/build/guides/access-control/) |

<CardGrid>
  <LinkCard title="Browse the example apps" href="/build/examples/" description="Every snippet here is lifted from a runnable app under apps/." />
  <LinkCard title="Collection reference" href="/build/collections/" description="The full list of CRDT collections and their merge semantics." />
</CardGrid>
